book_no.text: ใบรับรองหุ้นเลขที่

root.sql: select sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) as member_name , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock / sc_share_m_constant.share_value_perunit as share_amout , sc_share_m_constant.share_value_perunit , '!book_no!' as book_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( '!book_date!' , 'SD' ) as book_tday , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( '!book_date!' , 'MONTH' ) as book_tmonth , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( '!book_date!' , 'YYYY' ) as book_tyear from sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_share_m_constant where 1=1 /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = '01960' order by sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no
